{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032114243499D2F8BD6C356B664784\"}"},"total":20},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7353236426387653395","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"《诡案现场》是一部不错的悬疑小说，它的情节扣人心弦，让人一读就停不下来。作者孙铭苑在书中塑造了多个生动的角色，其中吴聃是我最喜欢的角色之一。他是一个神秘的男人，身上充满了谜团，但是他的善良和正义感也让人印象深刻。在小说中，吴聃和我一起经历了许多诡异的事情，每一次都让我感到毛骨悚然。但是，我也从他身上学到了许多东西，比如勇敢、机智和坚持不懈的精神。总的来说，《诡案现场》是一部值得一读的小说。它不仅让我感受到了悬疑小说的魅力，也让我学到了许多人生的道理。","text_exts":[{"e":16,"s":12,"text":"悬疑小说","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E6%82%AC%E7%96%91%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317740742746B664784%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227353236426387653395%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227316457020956085310%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%82%AC%E7%96%91%E5%B0%8F%E8%AF%B4%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1709758776,"group_id":"7316457020956085310","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NzHNlGy6WjBe2E+vAdyeD0M=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"169797632408779","user_name":"喜欢鸡爪谷的叶族长"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"169797632408779","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7316457020956085310","book_info":{"abstract":"20岁那年，案发现场的祠堂中供奉着一幅空白的画？相拥在古树里的为何是两具男尸？屋内的黑影究竟是人还是鬼？迷踪之后，凶手到底是人，还是鬼？","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p6-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/54f2151134c1bc2f1b03dfc27c2fabe5~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"孙铭苑","author_id":"","book_id":"7316457020956085310","book_name":"诡案现场","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#182830","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"7.5万人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":751,\"name\":\"悬疑灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751\u0026name=悬疑灵异\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":10,\"name\":\"悬疑\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10\u0026name=悬疑\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":100,\"name\":\"灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100\u0026name=灵异\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":970,\"name\":\"精品小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970\u0026name=精品小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":165,\"name\":\"悬疑推理\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165\u0026name=悬疑推理\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":867,\"name\":\"捉鬼\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867\u0026name=捉鬼\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7316457743668218942","read_count":"562","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1958837"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"653","tags":"悬疑灵异,精品小说,悬疑推理,悬疑,灵异,捉鬼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/54f2151134c1bc2f1b03dfc27c2fabe5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779258274\u0026x-signature=LXWEnsEQj%2FtKWeSU1WiePTqPvpk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"" 疑灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751\u0026name=悬疑灵异\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":10,\"name\":\"悬疑\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10\u0026name=悬疑\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":100,\"name\":\"灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=100\u0026name=灵异\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":970,\"name\":\"精品小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=970\u0026name=精品小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":165,\"name\":\"悬疑推理\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=165\u0026name=悬疑推理\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":867,\"name\":\"捉鬼\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=867\u0026name=捉鬼\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=1\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7316457743668218942","read_count":"562","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1958837"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.2","serial_count":"653","tags":"悬疑灵异,精品小说,悬疑推理,悬疑,灵异,捉鬼","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/54f2151134c1bc2f1b03dfc27c2fabe5~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779258274\u0026x-signature=LXWEnsEQj%2FtKWeSU1WiePTqPvpk%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"313"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"2026032114243499D2F8BD6C356B664784\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_count":8,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":1778,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":39151,"reply_count":1,"show_pv":5129},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"data_type":4},{"comment":{"comment_id":
